name: Birthday
description: A full-screen birthday celebration for digital signage. Shows a big personalised "Happy Birthday" greeting under a slow shower of confetti, with an optional message and signature. Set it up for one person per screen — the name, message, and sender all arrive in the launch URL, so one deployment celebrates anyone.
summary: Celebrate someone's birthday on any display.

name.title: Name
name.description: Whose birthday it is, e.g. Alex.

message.title: Message
message.description: Optional line under the greeting. Defaults to a friendly wish.

from.title: From
from.description: Optional signature, e.g. The Screenly Team.
